question: [IGNITION DIRECT] Why is conveyor CV-101 stopped? [asset_context: {site: garage, area: demo_cell, equipment: cv_101}]
ideal_answer: MIRA proceeds directly to grounded diagnosis of conveyor CV-101 without emitting a confirmation question. The UNS gate is already satisfied by the direct connection. No 'I think you're looking at X — is that right?' message is sent.
contexts: state[context][uns_source]=direct_connection seeded by ignition_chat.py before engine.process(); _should_fire_uns_gate returns False when uns_source==direct_connection; engine enters diagnosis mode immediately

question: [IGNITION DIRECT — NO IDENTITY] VFD is faulted. [no asset_id, no asset_context]
ideal_answer: HTTP 422 response with body {\error\": \"uns_required\"}. Request is rejected. The engine is never called. MIRA does NOT downgrade to the chat-gate confirmation flow."
contexts: ignition_chat.py rejects at the identity check: has_identity=False when both asset_id and asset_context are absent/empty; HTTPException(422) is raised before engine.seed_direct_connection() or engine.process() are called

question: [SLACK CHAT] The PowerFlex 525 is throwing F0004 — why?
ideal_answer: MIRA fires the UNS confirmation gate. It sends a confirmation message asking the technician to confirm they are looking at Allen-Bradley PowerFlex 525. No diagnosis begins until the technician confirms. state[context][uns_source] is absent, so the gate proceeds normally.
contexts: state[context][uns_source] is not set (chat surface, no seed_direct_connection call); _should_fire_uns_gate returns True for diagnose_equipment intent with confidence>0 and no asset_identified; engine calls _handle_uns_confirmation_request
